'''manguku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycorrhisation|mycorrhisation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ng-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycorrhisation|mycorrhisation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| manguku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mængikith|mængikith]] || [[word:mængikij|mængikij]] || [[word:mængikish|mængikish]] || [[word:mængiki|mængiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mangungukuth|mangungukuth]] || [[word:mangungukuj|mangungukuj]] || [[word:mangungukush|mangungukush]] || [[word:mangunguku|mangunguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mangukuth|mangukuth]] || [[word:mangukuj|mangukuj]] || [[word:mangukush|mangukush]] || [[word:manguku|manguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mangufkuth|mangufkuth]] || [[word:mangufkuj|mangufkuj]] || [[word:mangufkush|mangufkush]] || [[word:mangufkuf|mangufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mangukuthu|mangukuthu]] || [[word:mangukuju|mangukuju]] || [[word:mangukushu|mangukushu]] || [[word:mangukuku|mangukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mangukuth|mangukuth]] || [[word:mangukuj|mangukuj]] || [[word:mangukush|mangukush]] || [[word:manguku|manguku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mangukuthul|mangukuthul]] || [[word:mangukujul|mangukujul]] || [[word:mangukushul|mangukushul]] || [[word:mangukukul|mangukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mangukuthuthu|mangukuthuthu]] || [[word:mangukujuju|mangukujuju]] || [[word:mangukushushu|mangukushushu]] || [[word:mangukuku|mangukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mangukuthun|mangukuthun]] || [[word:mangukujun|mangukujun]] || [[word:mangukushun|mangukushun]] || [[word:mangukukun|mangukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mangukuthuoro|mangukuthuoro]] || [[word:mangukujuoro|mangukujuoro]] || [[word:mangukushuoro|mangukushuoro]] || [[word:mangukukuoro|mangukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
